name: Network Planner
description: A planning and analytics suite that shows where to expand and which lines need more trains, when: real road-network walk-shed catchments with per-station coverage and net-new counts, a Game/Walk count toggle, system and per-line length, mode-shift potential, a first-line finder for fresh maps, a ranked build-here-next list, and a daily capacity advisor with per-line load factor. Optional key-free satellite basemaps.
